summary.para:
This font is for the condensed font for generic uses. Consider using
instead when the texts you want to draw only contain only non-CJK characters.

The native functions for text drawing will use the condensed font Chalet Comprim? Cologne 1960 when the game language is set to a non-CJK language, but they will use the standard font, which is the same as
, when the game language is set to a CJK language (unless the player have custom font files installed).
